title: Public property
doc_html:
§599.18. Public property

            A. Property of an authority is public property devoted to an essential public and governmental function and purpose.

            B. Income of an authority is received for a public and governmental purpose.

            Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
doc_text:
§599.18. Public property
A. Property of an authority is public property devoted to an essential public and
governmental function and purpose.
B. Income of an authority is received for a public and governmental purpose.
Acts 2025, No. 443, §1.
